exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.coaching_cue: Move slowly through each vertebra, match breath to movement
exercises.default_mod: Reduce ROM if neck or back discomfort

exercises.name: Pelvic Tilts
exercises.coaching_cue: Small range, feel lower back press into mat
exercises.default_mod: Keep knees together, reduce range

exercises.name: Thread the Needle
exercises.coaching_cue: Rotate from thoracic spine, keep hips square
exercises.default_mod: Half rotation, stay on forearm instead of reaching through

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.coaching_cue: Elbows push knees outward, hold at comfortable depth
exercises.default_mod: Stay higher, heels on mat, hold support

exercises.name: World's Greatest Stretch
exercises.coaching_cue: Front knee at 90, rotate chest toward front leg, back knee down
exercises.default_mod: Kneeling version, reduce rotation, hands on floor for support

exercises.name: Cossack Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Shift weight sideways, opposite leg straight, control depth
exercises.default_mod: Small range, hold support, keep bent leg less deep

exercises.name: Deep Lunge with Rotation
exercises.coaching_cue: Front knee at 90, rotate torso toward front leg, reach arm up
exercises.default_mod: Hands on floor or block, reduce rotation, shorter lunge

exercises.name: Ankle Dorsiflexion Rocking
exercises.coaching_cue: Knee forward over toe, keep heel planted
exercises.default_mod: Reduce range, use wall support, seated ankle circles as alternative

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling Hip Flexor
exercises.coaching_cue: Tuck tailbone, lean forward from ankles, keep torso upright
exercises.default_mod: Pad under back knee, reduce lean, seated version

exercises.name: Spiderman Stretch
exercises.coaching_cue: Walk hands forward, step foot outside hand, rotate chest open
exercises.default_mod: Knees on mat, no rotation, hands on blocks

exercises.name: Figure-4 Stretch
exercises.coaching_cue: Cross ankle over opposite knee, pull leg toward chest
exercises.default_mod: Foot on floor, knee across body only

exercises.name: Child's Pose
exercises.coaching_cue: Knees wide or together, arms forward or by sides, breathe
exercises.default_mod: Pillow under thighs, arms on cushion

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.coaching_cue: Knees over to one side, head opposite, keep shoulders on mat
exercises.default_mod: Keep knees stacked, no twist, just side-lying release

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4
exercises.coaching_cue: Foot on opposite thigh, pull leg toward chest gently
exercises.default_mod: Hand behind thigh instead of shin, reduce pull

exercises.name: Happy Baby
exercises.coaching_cue: Knees toward armpits, hold feet or shins, rock gently
exercises.default_mod: One leg at a time, foot on floor

exercises.name: Standing Pigeon
exercises.coaching_cue: Cross ankle over opposite knee, hinge forward, hold support
exercises.default_mod: Seated figure-4, hold thigh instead of shin

exercises.name: Single-Leg RDL (mobility)
exercises.coaching_cue: Hinge back, free leg lifts, light weight, focus on range
exercises.default_mod: Both feet on ground, hinge to comfortable range only

exercises.name: Brettzel Stretch
exercises.coaching_cue: Lying twist with opposite knee pulled back, breath into stretch
exercises.default_mod: Unwind 50%, keep shoulders on mat, skip head rotation

exercises.name: Lizard Lunge
exercises.coaching_cue: Front foot outside hand, rear knee down, sink hips
exercises.default_mod: Hands on blocks or chair, less depth

exercises.name: Puppy Pose
exercises.coaching_cue: Hips over knees, walk hands forward, lower chest toward floor
exercises.default_mod: Less forward fold, arms on chair or blocks

exercises.name: Wall Ankle Mobilisation
exercises.coaching_cue: Front knee to wall in half-kneeling, keep heel down
exercises.default_mod: Stand further from wall, reduce knee bend

exercises.name: Seated Side Bend
exercises.coaching_cue: Arm over head, hinge sideways, feel side stretch
exercises.default_mod: Arm stays down, minimal lean

exercises.name: Diaphragmatic Breathing
exercises.coaching_cue: Hands on ribs, inhale expand 360 degrees, exhale slow
exercises.default_mod: Seated if supine not comfortable

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Shift
exercises.coaching_cue: Both knees bent at 90 degrees, shift hips side to side
exercises.default_mod: One leg straight, one bent, smaller shift

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring Stretch
exercises.coaching_cue: Straight leg on step or floor, pull band gently, hinge forward
exercises.default_mod: Bent knee, foot on floor

exercises.name: Chest Opener Stretch
exercises.coaching_cue: Clasp hands behind back, open chest, roll shoulders back
exercises.default_mod: Arms to sides, squeeze shoulder blades

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Chest up, knees out, go to comfortable depth
exercises.default_mod: Raised heels, partial ROM, lighter weight

exercises.name: Front Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Elbows high, brace core, descend with control
exercises.default_mod: Goblet hold instead, reduce load, partial depth

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Bar on traps, brace, hips back and down
exercises.default_mod: Front squat or goblet squat, reduce load

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Front heel down, back foot on box, control depth
exercises.default_mod: Reduce depth, no weight, reverse lunge instead

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
exercises.coaching_cue: Step back, back knee to floor, front heel down
exercises.default_mod: No weight, shorter lunge, hold support

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.coaching_cue: Upright torso, step into lunge, drive through front heel
exercises.default_mod: No weight, shorter stride, stationary lunges

exercises.name: Step-Up
exercises.coaching_cue: Full foot on box, drive through heel, step down controlled
exercises.default_mod: Lower box, lighter weight or no weight

exercises.name: Single-Leg RDL
exercises.coaching_cue: Hinge at hips, free leg back, keep spine neutral
exercises.default_mod: Both feet, lighter weight, or no weight for pattern

exercises.name: Dumbbell Row (2-point)
exercises.coaching_cue: Hinge to flat back, pull dumbbell to hip, squeeze
exercises.default_mod: Knee on bench for support, lighter weight, band row

exercises.name: Single-Arm DB Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Opposite knee on bench, flat back, pull elbow back
exercises.default_mod: Both feet on floor, lighter weight

exercises.name: Bent-Over DB Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Hinge to 45 degrees, pull both dumbbells, squeeze shoulder blades
exercises.default_mod: Light weight, chest on incline bench for support

exercises.name: Band Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Anchor band, pull elbows back, squeeze shoulder blades
exercises.default_mod: Lighter band, seated version

exercises.name: DB Bench Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Upper arms at 45 degrees, control descent, press with power
exercises.default_mod: Lighter weight, floor press for greater stability

exercises.name: DB Floor Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Elbows touch floor, press up, keep core braced
exercises.default_mod: Lighter weight, single arm for focus

exercises.name: DB Incline Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Upper chest focus, control the descent, don't arch
exercises.default_mod: Flat bench instead, lighter weight

exercises.name: DB Overhead Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Stack ribs, engage core, press to ceiling
exercises.default_mod: Seated with back support, single arm, lighter weight

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
exercises.coaching_cue: Heels close to glutes, drive hips up, squeeze at top
exercises.default_mod: Both feet on floor, smaller lift, or feet wider

exercises.name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge
exercises.coaching_cue: One foot raised, press through planted heel
exercises.default_mod: Both feet on floor, focus on one leg intent

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.coaching_cue: Opposite arm and leg extend, core braced, no arching
exercises.default_mod: Arms only or legs only, feet on floor sliding

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.coaching_cue: Elbows under shoulders, body straight, brace core
exercises.default_mod: From knees, shorter hold duration

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.coaching_cue: Elbow under shoulder, hips forward, hold
exercises.default_mod: From knees, shorter hold

exercises.name: Farmer's Carry
exercises.coaching_cue: Tall posture, shoulders back, grip tight, walk controlled
exercises.default_mod: Lighter weight, shorter distance, single arm

exercises.name: Suitcase Carry
exercises.coaching_cue: Single side carry, resist lean, core braced
exercises.default_mod: Lighter weight, shorter distance

exercises.name: Reverse Hyperextension (floor)
exercises.coaching_cue: Lying on mat, lift legs, squeeze glutes, keep core braced
exercises.default_mod: One leg at a time

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.coaching_cue: Hold band in front, pull apart, squeeze shoulder blades
exercises.default_mod: Lighter band, shorter range of motion

exercises.name: Tricep Extension
exercises.coaching_cue: Overhead or lying, keep elbows in, extend full
exercises.default_mod: Lighter weight, single arm

exercises.name: Bicep Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Elbows fixed at sides, curl, control the negative
exercises.default_mod: Lighter weight, alternating arms

exercises.name: Kettlebell Deadlift
exercises.coaching_cue: Hinge back, shins vertical, drive through heels to stand
exercises.default_mod: No weight, focus on hinge pattern

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing (2-hand)
exercises.coaching_cue: Hike the bell, snap hips forward, shoulders packed
exercises.default_mod: Hip hinge only, no float, lighter weight, or deadlift

exercises.name: Kettlebell Clean
exercises.coaching_cue: Pull elbow high, flip bell, absorb into rack position
exercises.default_mod: Deadlift to high pull only, lighter weight

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Slam
exercises.coaching_cue: Overhead, slam down, catch on bounce, brace core
exercises.default_mod: No throw, just overhead lower to floor, or wall throw

exercises.name: Box Jump (low)
exercises.coaching_cue: Soft landing, full foot on box, step down
exercises.default_mod: Box step-up explosive, or no jump

exercises.name: Explosive Step-Up
exercises.coaching_cue: Drive through heel, quick transition, step down controlled
exercises.default_mod: Lower box, lighter weight or no weight

exercises.name: Banded Walk
exercises.coaching_cue: Band above knees, half-squat position, small steps
exercises.default_mod: Lighter band, taller stance, smaller steps

exercises.name: Lateral Shuffle
exercises.coaching_cue: Athletic stance, push off, quick feet, stay low
exercises.default_mod: Smaller steps, walk instead of shuffle

exercises.name: Bear Crawl
exercises.coaching_cue: Opposite hand and knee, flat back, don't rush
exercises.default_mod: Knee walks, hands on floor, shorter distance

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.coaching_cue: Plank position, drive knees to chest, control pace
exercises.default_mod: From knees, slower pace, or toe taps

exercises.name: Marching Glute Bridge
exercises.coaching_cue: Bridge up, march knees alternating, keep hips level
exercises.default_mod: Both feet on floor, small pulses

exercises.name: Hip CARs
exercises.coaching_cue: Slow controlled hip circles at end range, stand tall
exercises.default_mod: Light touch for balance, seated hip circles

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge + Knee Drive
exercises.coaching_cue: Lunge back, drive front knee up at stand, add load
exercises.default_mod: No weight, no knee drive, just reverse lunge

exercises.name: Renegade Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Plank on dumbbells, row one arm, keep hips still
exercises.default_mod: From knees, or plank hold only

exercises.name: Kettlebell Deadlift to Swing Flow
exercises.coaching_cue: Flow deadlift into small swing, hinge snap at top
exercises.default_mod: Deadlift only, no float

exercises.name: Rowing Machine (intervals)
exercises.coaching_cue: Drive with legs, pull with back, finish with arms
exercises.default_mod: Reduced intensity, shorter intervals

exercises.name: Stationary Bike (intervals)
exercises.coaching_cue: Smooth pedal stroke, controlled effort, no bouncing
exercises.default_mod: Low resistance, seated only

exercises.name: Treadmill Walk (incline)
exercises.coaching_cue: Tall posture, swing arms, controlled pace
exercises.default_mod: Flat walk, slower pace, shorter duration

exercises.name: Skater Tap Downs
exercises.coaching_cue: Lateral push off, tap back foot, quick rebound
exercises.default_mod: Small side step, no tap down, walk pattern

exercises.name: Single-Leg Deadlift to Balance
exercises.coaching_cue: Hinge, free leg back, stand tall at top, balance
exercises.default_mod: Both feet on ground, mini hinge, light weight

exercises.name: Clamshell
exercises.coaching_cue: Side lying, knees bent, lift top knee, don't rotate hips
exercises.default_mod: Small range, band above knees for resistance

exercises.name: Side-Lying Leg Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Bottom leg bent for stability, top leg straight, lift
exercises.default_mod: Small range, bent top leg

exercises.name: Arch Hold / Cobra
exercises.coaching_cue: Prone, hands under shoulders, gently lift chest
exercises.default_mod: Prone on elbows, less back extension

exercises.name: Downward Dog
exercises.coaching_cue: Hips up and back, straight legs or bent, pedal feet
exercises.default_mod: Child's pose, shortened hold

exercises.name: Standing Calf Stretch
exercises.coaching_cue: Back leg straight, heel down, forward lean
exercises.default_mod: Bent knee, less lean

exercises.name: Lateral Lunge
exercises.coaching_cue: Step wide, push hips back, keep chest up
exercises.default_mod: Small step, no depth, hold support
